name: moon-bash
description: Zero-dependency pure-memory POSIX Shell sandbox written in MoonBit

scripts.build: moon -C src build --target js && vp pack
scripts.build:website: moon -C src build --target js && vp build -c vite.website.config.ts
scripts.test: moon -C src build --target js && vp test run
scripts.test:comparison: moon -C src build --target js && vp test run tests/comparison/
scripts.test:watch: moon -C src build --target js && vp test watch
